violations.text: An employee was observed not washing hands and/or changing gloves between tasks (making sandwich and working cash register). PIC to instruct employee on correct glove use and hand washing procedures. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings observed in front service area and back storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024
The blades of the vegetable slicer were in poor repair (obseved bent and/or chipped). PIC instructed to take slicer out of service until blades are replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (vegetable slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC placed slicer in 3-bay. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023

Various location on the floor has an light accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC stated establishment will preform a thorough cleaning tonight. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023
